title: Squirrel Removal in Kew Gardens, Queens | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Kew Gardens, Queens. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic restoration. Serving historic Kew Gardens homes. Call (NYC) for fast service!
intro: Kew Gardens homeowners know that squirrels can quickly invade attics, chew through wiring, and cause costly damage to these beautiful historic properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Kew Gardens, from the tree-lined streets near Forest Park to the elegant Tudor and Colonial homes that define this Queens neighborhood. Our humane removal process includes trapping, exclusion, and full attic restoration to protect your home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kew Gardens residents for years with reliable, humane squirrel removal that addresses both the immediate infestation and long-term prevention. Our technicians understand the unique architecture of Kew Gardens homes and provide customized solutions that preserve your property's historic character while keeping squirrels out for good.
localContext: Kew Gardens' proximity to Forest Park and its mature tree canopy create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive and seek shelter in nearby homes, particularly in attics and roof spaces. The neighborhood's mix of century-old single-family homes, co-ops along Queens Boulevard, and garden apartments each present unique entry points that our experienced team knows how to identify and seal.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Kew Gardens typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic restoration is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Kew Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof vents, damaged soffits, gaps in fascia boards, and openings where tree branches touch the roofline. Kew Gardens' mature trees and older home construction can create multiple access points that squirrels exploit, especially during fall and winter when they seek warm nesting sites.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-capture traps and follow all New York State wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely relocated away from residential areas, and we never use poisons or lethal methods that could harm other wildlife or pets in the Kew Gardens community.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Kew Gardens home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service in Kew Gardens for emergency situations. Most squirrel removal projects take 3-7 days for trapping, followed by exclusion work to seal all entry points and prevent re-entry. Attic cleanup and restoration, if needed, may take additional time depending on the extent of damage.
